body: Suresh, aapke Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 offer ne 30 din mein 12400 views aur 88 calls generate kiye. Aapke corporate bulk thali package ke liye kya planning kar rahe hain?

body: Aditya, appointment tomorrow at Karim's Salon - confirm now? 📅

body: Ramesh, your pharmacy's calls are 18% above peers, with 38 calls in the last 30 days. What actions can you take to maintain this momentum, especially with summer trends showing high demand for ORS, sunscreen, and antifungal medicines?

body: Meera, 22 days since your last post, views down 0.18, consider a new offer to boost engagement

body: Mr. Sharma, aapki medicines ki refill due hai. Free Home Delivery > ₹499 ke saath book a slot at Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy?

body: Meera, Smile Studio just opened 1.3km away, your 38% retention is at risk, will you run a loyalty offer this month? 📅

body: Meera, DCI revised radiograph dose limits: 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv by Dec 15. Will you audit your X-ray setup and update SOPs to ensure compliance?
